creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 17 November 2011 20:06, Pavel Timofeev <timp87@gmail.com> wrote:
> Well, it works good with /bin/sh now. And I wouldn't like to change it.
>

It certainly *appears* to work.

Consider this patch here, whose absence caused an extremely irritating
intermittent problem with clamav:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/clamav/files/Attic/patch-unit_tests-check_common_sh?rev=1.1

Just an example of where a bash script running on sh can cause weird
problems while appearing to work fine.

Feel free to ignore this concern; I only wish to avoid confusion later ;)

Chris
